      public Map<String, List<String>> getAuthorisedHostsAndDestinations(String user) throws DataBaseException
      Gets all (host, destination) pairs the user is authorised to access in a single combined query, avoiding two separate round trips against the same permission tables.

      user - the web user id

    • getDataTransfersToReplicateIterator

      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • saveDestinationMetaField

      public void saveDestinationMetaField(DestinationMetaField field) throws DataBaseException
      Inserts or updates a destination metadata field definition. If DMF_ID > 0 it updates; otherwise it inserts (ID auto-generated).
      Parameters:
      field - the field definition
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • deleteDestinationMetaField

      public void deleteDestinationMetaField(DestinationMetaField field) throws DataBaseException
      Deletes a destination metadata field definition (and cascades to values and type rows via DB FK).
      Parameters:
      field - the field to delete
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • getDestinationMetaFieldTypeMap

      public Map<Integer, Set<Integer>> getDestinationMetaFieldTypeMap() throws DataBaseException
      Gets a map of fieldId → set of allowed DES_TYPE values. An empty set for a given fieldId means "applies to all types".
      Returns:
      the field type map
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • setDestinationMetaFieldTypes

      public void setDestinationMetaFieldTypes(int fieldId, Collection<Integer> types) throws DataBaseException
      Replaces the DES_TYPE restrictions for a single field. An empty/null collection means "applies to all types" (removes all rows for this field).
      Parameters:
      fieldId - the field id
      types - the allowed DES_TYPE values (empty = all)
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

      public Collection<DestinationMetaValue> getDestinationMetaValuesByDestination(String destinationName) throws DataBaseException

      Returns:
      the destination meta values by destination
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • saveDestinationMetaValue

      public void saveDestinationMetaValue(DestinationMetaValue value) throws DataBaseException
      Inserts or updates a destination metadata value. If DMV_ID > 0 it updates; otherwise it inserts (ID auto-generated).
      Parameters:
      value - the destination meta value
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • deleteDestinationMetaValue

      public void deleteDestinationMetaValue(long dmvId) throws DataBaseException
      Deletes a destination metadata value by its PK.
      Parameters:
      dmvId - the dmv id
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • setDestinationMetaValues

      public void setDestinationMetaValues(String destinationName, Collection<DestinationMetaValue> values) throws DataBaseException
      Replaces ALL metadata values for a destination with the given list. Deletes old values not present in the new list, inserts/updates the rest.
      Parameters:
      destinationName - the destination name
      values - the new values
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • getUsedMetaFieldIds

      public Set<Integer> getUsedMetaFieldIds() throws DataBaseException
      Returns the set of DMF_IDs that have at least one value assigned to any destination.
      Returns:
      set of used field ids
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • scanMetadataAttachments

      public Map<String, List<Map<String,Object>>> scanMetadataAttachments(String destinationName) throws DataBaseException
      Scans the attachments directory on the server for XML metadata files for a given destination (or all destinations if destinationName is null). Parsing is done using the standard tag-to-field mapping. The returned map is keyed by destination name; each value is a list of entry maps, where a successful entry contains fieldName, fieldId, value, and position, and a parse-error entry contains file and error.
      Parameters:
      destinationName - the destination to scan, or null to scan all destinations
      Returns:
      destination name → list of field-entry maps
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • upsertPortalBytesSnapshot

      public void upsertPortalBytesSnapshot(Timestamp minute, String user, long uploadBytes, long downloadBytes) throws DataBaseException
      Upsert a portal bytes snapshot (minute-bucket aggregate) for a user.
      Parameters:
      minute - truncated-to-minute timestamp
      user - the user id
      uploadBytes - bytes uploaded in this bucket
      downloadBytes - bytes downloaded in this bucket
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

    • getRecentPortalBytesSnapshots

      public Map<String, List<long[]>> getRecentPortalBytesSnapshots(int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException
      Load all portal bytes snapshots within the given retention window for startup repopulation.
      Parameters:
      retentionHours - how many hours back to fetch
      Returns:
      map keyed by user id; each value contains long[] { minuteMs, uploadBytes, downloadBytes }
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

    • deleteOldPortalBytesSnapshots

      public void deleteOldPortalBytesSnapshots(int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException
      Delete portal bytes snapshots older than the configured retention window.
      Parameters:
      retentionHours - number of hours to retain
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

      public void upsertDestinationBytesSnapshot(Timestamp minute, String destination, long uploadBytes, long downloadBytes) throws DataBaseException
      Throws:
      DataBaseException

      public Map<String, List<long[]>> getRecentDestinationBytesSnapshots(int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException

      DataBaseException

      public void deleteOldDestinationBytesSnapshots(int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException
      Throws:
      DataBaseException

    • upsertMoverAvailabilitySnapshot

      public void upsertMoverAvailabilitySnapshot(Timestamp minute, String mover, boolean available) throws DataBaseException
      Upsert a mover availability snapshot for a given minute bucket.
      Parameters:
      minute - the truncated-to-minute timestamp
      mover - the data mover name
      available - true if the mover sent a heartbeat during this minute
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

    • getMoverAvailabilitySnapshots

      public List<long[]> getMoverAvailabilitySnapshots(String mover, int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException
      Load mover availability snapshots within the given retention window.
      Parameters:
      mover - the data mover name
      retentionHours - how many hours back to fetch
      Returns:
      list of long[2] entries where [0] is the minute epoch-ms and [1] is 1 (up) or 0 (down)
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

    • deleteOldMoverAvailabilitySnapshots

      public void deleteOldMoverAvailabilitySnapshots(int retentionHours) throws DataBaseException
      Delete mover availability snapshots older than the configured retention window.
      Parameters:
      retentionHours - number of hours to retain
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - on DB error

    • getDestinationCountsByHost

      public Map<String,Integer> getDestinationCountsByHost() throws DataBaseException
      Gets a map of host name to destination count using a single GROUP BY query on the ASSOCIATION table.
      Returns:
      map of host name → destination count
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception

    • getDestinationNamesByHost

      public Map<String, List<String>> getDestinationNamesByHost() throws DataBaseException
      Gets a map of host name to sorted list of destination names using a single ASSOCIATION table query.
      Returns:
      map of host name → sorted list of destination names
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - the data base exception
